description: Improve the lead system after the first Exa preview run on 2026-07-06. Current behavior: LeadPreview performs Exa company searches, persists preview telemetry/candidates, dedupes/classifies candidates, and requires manual promotion. First run produced 32 candidates, 31 promotable, 1 needs enrichment, cost /run/current-system/sw/bin/bash.042. Goal: inspect current implementation and make a small, high-leverage refinement that improves candidate quality/review usefulness without auto-promoting leads or creating a parallel non-Ash path.
title: Refine Exa lead preview and review loop
